items.reasoning: Standard regen for PL Spirit Lance harass and Naga Riptide magic damage.
Emergency burst heal if caught by Riptide + Spirit Lance combo early.
Sven needs guaranteed CS; Naga illusions contest the lane aggressively.
Builds into Magic Wand; cheap stats for early trading.
STR treads for HP in lane, AGI when farming jungle with cleave.
Attack speed + lifesteal accelerates farm. Cleave from Great Cleave + MoM melts stacked camps.
Spirit Lance + Mirror Image spam gives consistent wand charges.
Prevents Naga Song into PL Diffusal mana drain combo. Ensures you can channel Storm Hammer.
Double hit procs on real PL hero; mana sustain for Storm Hammer spam in fights.
Storm Hammer AoE stun hits all illusions and finds real PL. 900 AoE radius.
-5 enemy armor aura affects all illusions. +30 AS for God's Strength cleave.
Crit cleave from God's Strength one-shots entire illusion armies. Multiplicative scaling.
Initiation + AoE slow that tags all illusions. 150% STR damage on landing during God's Strength.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Sven's Great Cleave is the natural answer to illusion heroes. Rush farm speed with MoM, get BKB to fight through Song + Diffusal, then Aghanim's to guarantee AoE stun on the real PL. God's Strength + Daedalus crit cleave erases illusion armies in 2 hits.
